notes: Research agent registry, workflow, skill, and log scaffold added after Phase 1 so subsequent phases have explicit research handoffs before review.

Phase 2 register seeded from the completed ontology-comparison baseline plus append-only new candidates. Search records include query/count/evidence/licence/rationale/handoff fields and hash chaining; source rows include immutable hashes. Live registry/API searches remain future append records.

Quality benchmarking now covers UOGTO local ontology artifacts, SHACL coverage, examples per module, competency-query coverage, local OOPS-style pitfall indicators, and OWL profile/reasoner status. External comparator metrics are intentionally deferred until Phase 3 acquisition adds parsed artifacts.

reviewer_handoff: article-hardening review workflow should verify table captions and claim-to-row links before manuscript freeze.
